member.summary: Get all active Claude instances

member.summary: Get details for a specific instance

member.summary: Get output history for an instance

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.InstancesController.NotifyAwaitingInput(System.String,Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.AwaitInputRequest)
member.summary: Called by Claude CLI when it needs user input

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.InstancesController.GetInteractionResponse(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Poll endpoint for Claude CLI to check for user response

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.InstancesController.RespondToInteraction(System.String,System.Int64,Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.RespondRequest)
member.summary: User submits response to an interaction

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.InteractionsController.GetPendingInteractions
member.summary: Get all pending interactions across all instances

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController
member.summary: API endpoints for managing predefined prompt templates. Provides CRUD operations and template usage tracking.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController.GetAllTemplates(System.String)
member.summary: Get all templates, optionally filtered by category

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController.GetTemplate(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific template by ID

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController.GetFavorites
member.summary: Get all favorite templates

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController.GetRecent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get recently used templates

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController.GetCategories
member.summary: Get all unique categories

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController.CreateTemplate(Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate)
member.summary: Create a new template

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController.UpdateTemplate(System.String,Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate)
member.summary: Update an existing template

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController.DeleteTemplate(System.String)
member.summary: Delete a template

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController.RecordUsage(System.String)
member.summary: Record that a template was used (increment usage count)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.PromptTemplateController.ToggleFavorite(System.String)
member.summary: Toggle favorite status for a template

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController
member.summary:
REST API for terminal session management. Use this to create sessions via REST, then connect via SignalR for streaming.
Typical workflow: 1. POST /api/terminal/sessions - Create a session, get sessionId 2. Connect to SignalR hub at /hubs/terminal 3. Call hub.JoinSession(sessionId) to receive output 4. Call hub.SendInput(sessionId, data) to send input

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.GetSessions
member.summary: Get all active terminal sessions

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.GetSession(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific terminal session

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.CreateSession(Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.CreateTerminalSessionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new terminal session. After creation, connect via SignalR to /hubs/terminal and call JoinSession(sessionId).

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.TerminateSession(System.String)
member.summary: Terminate a terminal session

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.SendInput(System.String,Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.SendInputRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send input to a terminal session (alternative to SignalR) Note: SignalR is preferred for low-latency bidirectional communication

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.GetSessionHistory(System.String)
member.summary: Get terminal output history for a session

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.SendSignal(System.String,Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.SendSignalRequest)
member.summary: Send a signal to the process (e.g., SIGINT for Ctrl+C)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.GetStats
member.summary: Get terminal stats

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.GetConfig
member.summary: Get terminal configuration defaults. Frontend can use this to populate session creation forms.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.GetExternalInstances
member.summary: Get external Claude instances running on this machine (from agent tracking database). These are Claude agents that were started outside of this orchestration tool.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.GetArchivedSessions(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get archived session logs with pagination

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.GetArchivedSessionLog(System.String)
member.summary: Get log content for an archived session

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.ParseLogFileMetadata(System.String)
member.summary: Parse metadata from log file header

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.RestoreArchivedSession(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restore an archived session - creates a new session and sends the archived log content as input

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.ExtractConversationContent(System.String)
member.summary: Extract conversation content from log file (remove timestamps, ANSI codes, and system metadata)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.StripAnsiCodes(System.String)
member.summary: Remove ANSI escape sequences from text

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalController.GetAllSessionsAndInstances
member.summary: Get all sessions including external instances (combined view)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.CreateTerminalSessionRequest.Command
member.summary: Command to execute (default: "claude")

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.CreateTerminalSessionRequest.Arguments
member.summary: Command arguments

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.CreateTerminalSessionRequest.WorkingDirectory
member.summary: Working directory

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.CreateTerminalSessionRequest.Columns
member.summary: Terminal columns (default: 120)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.CreateTerminalSessionRequest.Rows
member.summary: Terminal rows (default: 30)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.CreateTerminalSessionRequest.MergeStderr
member.summary: Merge stderr into stdout (default: true)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.CreateTerminalSessionRequest.Environment
member.summary: Additional environment variables

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.SendInputRequest.Text
member.summary: Text input

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.SendInputRequest.Bytes
member.summary: Raw bytes input (base64 encoded)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.SendSignalRequest.Signal
member.summary: Signal name: interrupt, quit, terminate, kill

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalSessionDto.Title
member.summary: Dynamic title extracted from terminal output (e.g., from "STATUS: Title" pattern). If null, use Command as the display title.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalConfigDto
member.summary: Terminal configuration DTO for exposing defaults to frontend

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalConfigDto.DefaultCommand
member.summary: Default command/executable to run

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalConfigDto.DefaultWorkingDirectory
member.summary: Default working directory (null means current directory)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalConfigDto.DefaultArguments
member.summary: Default arguments to pass to the command

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalConfigDto.DefaultColumns
member.summary: Default terminal columns

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalConfigDto.DefaultRows
member.summary: Default terminal rows

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalConfigDto.MaxConcurrentSessions
member.summary: Maximum concurrent sessions

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalConfigDto.SessionTimeoutMinutes
member.summary: Session timeout in minutes

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.TerminalConfigDto.SignalRHubUrl
member.summary: SignalR hub URL for terminal connections

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.ArchivedSessionDto
member.summary: Archived session info (from log file)

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.ArchivedSessionsResponse
member.summary: Response for archived sessions list

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.SessionLogResponse
member.summary: Response for session log content

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Data.DatabaseInitializer
member.summary: Initializes the agent-activity.db database with required tables

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Agentic Orchestration services using Hazina's declarative pattern

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddHazinaAgenticOrchestration(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Add Hazina Agentic Orchestration with default configuration

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddHazinaAgenticOrchestration(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions})
member.summary: Add Hazina Agentic Orchestration with custom configuration

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddHazinaAgenticOrchestration(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions)
member.summary: Add Hazina Agentic Orchestration with options object

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.MapHazinaAgenticHubs(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder,Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions)
member.summary: Map SignalR hubs for Agentic Orchestration. Call this in Program.cs after app.Build()

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for Agentic Orchestration

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.DatabasePath
member.summary: Path to the SQLite database file Default: C:\scripts\_machine\agent-activity.db

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.LogsPath
member.summary: Path to the logs directory for output streaming Default: C:\scripts\logs

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.EnableSignalR
member.summary: Enable SignalR for real-time updates Default: true

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.SignalRHubPath
member.summary: SignalR hub path Default: /hubs/agentic

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.HeartbeatTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Heartbeat timeout in seconds for considering an instance inactive Default: 60

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.InteractionExpiryMinutes
member.summary: Interaction request expiry in minutes Default: 60

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.EnableTerminalStreaming
member.summary: Enable real-time terminal streaming (process-based I/O) Default: true

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.TerminalHubPath
member.summary: Terminal hub path for real-time process I/O Default: /hubs/terminal

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.DefaultTerminalColumns
member.summary: Default terminal columns Default: 120

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.DefaultTerminalRows
member.summary: Default terminal rows Default: 30

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.MaxConcurrentSessions
member.summary: Maximum concurrent terminal sessions Default: 10

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.SessionTimeoutMinutes
member.summary: Session timeout in minutes (inactive sessions are terminated) Default: 60

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.DefaultCommand
member.summary: Default command/executable to run when creating a new terminal session Default: "claude" (assumes Claude CLI is in PATH)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.DefaultWorkingDirectory
member.summary: Default working directory for new terminal sessions Default: null (uses current directory)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.DefaultArguments
member.summary: Default arguments to pass to the command Default: empty array

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.EnableSessionLogging
member.summary: Enable logging of all agent session input/output to files. Default: true

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Extensions.AgenticOrchestrationOptions.AgentSessionLogsPath
member.summary: Base path for agent session log files. Files are organized as: {BasePath}/{yyyy-MM-dd}/{HH}/session-{sessionId}.log Default: C:\scripts\logs\agent-sessions

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.ClaudeOrchestrationHub
member.summary: SignalR hub for real-time communication between web clients and Claude instances

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub
member.summary:
SignalR hub for real-time terminal communication.
Client Methods (called by server): - OnOutput(sessionId, bytes[]) - Output from the process - OnExit(sessionId, exitCode) - Process exited - OnSessionCreated(sessionId, config) - New session created - OnError(sessionId, error) - Error occurred
Server Methods (called by client): - StartSession(config) -> sessionId - Create a new terminal session - JoinSession(sessionId) - Subscribe to a session's output - LeaveSession(sessionId) - Unsubscribe from a session - SendInput(sessionId, bytes[]) - Send input to the process - SendInputText(sessionId, text) - Send text input (convenience) - Resize(sessionId, cols, rows) - Resize terminal - SendSignal(sessionId, signal) - Send signal (e.g., SIGINT) - Terminate(sessionId) - Terminate session - GetSessions() - List all active sessions

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub.StartSession(Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalStartRequest)
member.summary: Create a new terminal session

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub.JoinSession(System.String)
member.summary: Join an existing session to receive its output

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub.LeaveSession(System.String)
member.summary: Leave a session (stop receiving output)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub.SendInput(System.String,System.Int32[])
member.summary: Send input bytes to a session. Accepts int[] because JavaScript sends number arrays (System.Text.Json can't deserialize directly to byte[]).

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub.SendInputText(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Send text input to a session (convenience method)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub.Resize(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Resize the terminal

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub.SendSignal(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Send a signal to the process (e.g., SIGINT for Ctrl+C)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub.Terminate(System.String)
member.summary: Terminate a session

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub.GetSessions
member.summary: Get all active sessions

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalHub.GetSession(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific session's info

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalStartRequest
member.summary: Request to start a terminal session

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalStartRequest.PromptTemplateId
member.summary: Optional prompt template ID to auto-execute after session loads

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Hubs.TerminalSessionInfo
member.summary: Information about a terminal session

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.ClaudeInstance
member.summary: Represents an active Claude Code CLI instance

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.AwaitInputRequest
member.summary: Request from Claude instance for user input

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.UserResponse
member.summary: User response to an interaction request

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PendingInteraction
member.summary: Pending interaction waiting for user response

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.RespondRequest
member.summary: User's response to submit

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.OutputLine
member.summary: Represents a single line of output from a Claude instance

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate
member.summary: Predefined prompt template for starting Claude Code terminal sessions. Allows users to save frequently-used prompts and auto-execute them on session start.

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the template

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.Name
member.summary: Display name for the template (e.g., "Debug Frontend Build", "Run Tests")

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.Description
member.summary: Optional description of what this template does

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.PromptText
member.summary: The actual prompt text to send to Claude Code terminal

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.WorkingDirectory
member.summary: Optional working directory to use when starting the session

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.EnvironmentVariables
member.summary: Optional environment variables to set (key-value pairs)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.AutoExecute
member.summary: Whether to auto-submit the prompt immediately after session loads (true = auto-execute, false = show prompt but wait for user to press Enter)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.AutoExecuteDelayMs
member.summary: Optional delay in milliseconds before auto-executing (default 1000ms to allow Claude to load)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.Category
member.summary: Optional category/tag for organizing templates (e.g., "debugging", "testing", "deployment")

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.Icon
member.summary: Icon name for UI display (e.g., "bug", "test-tube", "rocket")

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.CreatedAt
member.summary: When this template was created

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.LastUsedAt
member.summary: When this template was last used

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.UsageCount
member.summary: How many times this template has been used

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.IsFavorite
member.summary: Whether this template is a favorite (for quick access)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate.SortOrder
member.summary: Display order (for sorting in UI)

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IAgentSessionLogger
member.summary: Logs all input and output from agent terminal sessions to files. Files are organized by date/hour to prevent too many files in one directory.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IAgentSessionLogger.StartSessionAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Start logging for a session. Creates the log file.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IAgentSessionLogger.LogOutputAsync(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Log output bytes from the terminal

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IAgentSessionLogger.LogOutputAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Log output text from the terminal

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IAgentSessionLogger.LogInputAsync(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Log input bytes sent to the terminal

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IAgentSessionLogger.LogInputAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Log input text sent to the terminal

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IAgentSessionLogger.EndSessionAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: End logging for a session. Writes final entry and closes the file.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IAgentSessionLogger.GetLogFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: Get the log file path for a session

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.AgentSessionLogger
member.summary:
Implementation of agent session logger that writes to files organized by date/hour.
Directory structure: {BasePath}/{yyyy-MM-dd}/{HH}/session-{sessionId}.log
Example: C:\scripts\logs\agent-sessions\2026-01-28\14\session-20260128-143052-abc12345.log

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.NullAgentSessionLogger
member.summary: Null implementation of agent session logger for when logging is disabled. All methods are no-ops.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService
member.summary: Service for managing predefined prompt templates. Provides CRUD operations and persistence for terminal session prompt templates.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService.GetAllTemplatesAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Get all templates, optionally filtered by category

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService.GetTemplateAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific template by ID

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService.GetFavoriteTemplatesAsync
member.summary: Get favorite templates (IsFavorite = true), ordered by SortOrder

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService.GetRecentTemplatesAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get most recently used templates (limit to top N)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService.CreateTemplateAsync(Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate)
member.summary: Create a new template

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService.UpdateTemplateAsync(Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Models.PromptTemplate)
member.summary: Update an existing template

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService.DeleteTemplateAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Delete a template by ID

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService.RecordTemplateUsageAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Record that a template was used (increment usage count, update LastUsedAt)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService.ToggleFavoriteAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Toggle favorite status for a template

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.IPromptTemplateService.GetCategoriesAsync
member.summary: Get all unique categories

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Services.PromptTemplateService
member.summary: File-based implementation of prompt template service. Stores templates in JSON file for persistence. For production, consider migrating to database storage.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyTerminalSession
member.summary:
Terminal session implementation using Windows ConPTY (Pseudo Console). Provides full TTY emulation for interactive TUI applications like Claude CLI, vim, htop, etc.
Key features: - Full ANSI escape sequence support - Proper TTY detection by child processes - Terminal resize support - Low-latency bidirectional I/O

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyTerminalSession.WaitingForInput
member.summary: Whether the session appears to be waiting for user input. Returns true when the terminal has been idle (no output) for at least 1 second.

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyTerminalSession.Title
member.summary: Dynamic title extracted from terminal output. Returns null if no title has been detected.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyTerminalSession.GetOutputHistory
member.summary: Get all output history as bytes

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyTerminalSession.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start the ConPTY session and begin streaming output.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyTerminalSession.WriteInputAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Write input to the terminal.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyTerminalSession.WriteInputAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Write string input (convenience method).

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyTerminalSession.SendSignalAsync(Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSignal)
member.summary: Send a signal to the process.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyTerminalSession.ResizeAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Resize the terminal.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyTerminalSession.TerminateAsync
member.summary: Terminate the process.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods
member.summary: P/Invoke definitions for Windows ConPTY (Pseudo Console) APIs. ConPTY allows creating a virtual terminal that TUI applications recognize as a real TTY. See: https://devblogs.microsoft.com/commandline/windows-command-line-introducing-the-windows-pseudo-console-conpty/

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.CreatePseudoConsole(Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.COORD,Microsoft.Win32.SafeHandles.SafeFileHandle,Microsoft.Win32.SafeHandles.SafeFileHandle,System.UInt32,System.IntPtr@)
member.summary: Creates a new pseudo console with the specified size.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.ResizePseudoConsole(System.IntPtr,Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.COORD)
member.summary: Resizes an existing pseudo console.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.ClosePseudoConsole(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Closes a pseudo console.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.CreatePipe(Microsoft.Win32.SafeHandles.SafeFileHandle@,Microsoft.Win32.SafeHandles.SafeFileHandle@,Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an anonymous pipe.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.InitializeProcThreadAttributeList(System.IntPtr,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.IntPtr@)
member.summary: Initializes the specified list of attributes for process and thread creation.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.UpdateProcThreadAttribute(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32,System.IntPtr,System.IntPtr,System.IntPtr,System.IntPtr,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Updates the specified attribute in a list of attributes for process and thread creation.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.DeleteProcThreadAttributeList(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Deletes the specified list of attributes for process and thread creation.
Creates a new process with extended startup info.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.TerminateProcess(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Terminates the specified process and all of its threads.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.GetExitCodeProcess(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32@)
member.summary: Retrieves the termination status of the specified process.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.WaitForSingleObject(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Waits until the specified object is in the signaled state or the time-out interval elapses.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.NativeMethods.CloseHandle(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Closes an open object handle.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.PseudoConsole
member.summary: Wrapper for a Windows Pseudo Console (ConPTY). Manages the lifecycle of the pseudo console and its associated pipes.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.PseudoConsole.Create(Microsoft.Win32.SafeHandles.SafeFileHandle,Microsoft.Win32.SafeHandles.SafeFileHandle,System.Int16,System.Int16)
member.summary: Creates a new pseudo console with the specified dimensions.
member.param: The read side of the input pipe (from the calling process)
The write side of the output pipe (to the calling process)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.PseudoConsole.Resize(System.Int16,System.Int16)
member.summary: Resizes the pseudo console to the specified dimensions.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.PseudoConsolePipe
member.summary: Creates and manages anonymous pipes for ConPTY communication.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyProcess
member.summary: Manages the process started within a ConPTY session.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyProcess.Start(System.String,System.String,Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.PseudoConsole,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Starts a new process attached to the specified pseudo console.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyProcess.WaitForExit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Waits for the process to exit with an optional timeout.
member.param: Timeout in milliseconds, or -1 for infinite
member.returns: True if the process exited, false if timeout occurred

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ConPty.ConPtyProcess.Kill
member.summary: Terminates the process.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession
member.summary: Represents a terminal session connected to a process. Provides bidirectional I/O for true terminal emulation.

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.SessionId
member.summary: Unique session identifier

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.IsRunning
member.summary: Whether the process is still running

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.ExitCode
member.summary: Process exit code (null if still running)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.StartedAt
member.summary: When the session was created

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.Command
member.summary: The command that was executed

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.WaitingForInput
member.summary: Whether the session is waiting for user input (e.g., showing a question)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.Title
member.summary: Dynamic title extracted from terminal output (e.g., from "STATUS: Title" pattern). Returns null if no title has been detected, in which case Command should be used.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.GetOutputHistory
member.summary: Get all output history as bytes

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start the terminal session and begin streaming output

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.WriteInputAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Write input bytes to the process stdin

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.WriteInputAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Write input string to the process stdin (convenience method)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.SendSignalAsync(Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSignal)
member.summary: Signal the process (e.g., SIGINT for Ctrl+C)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.ResizeAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Resize the terminal (if supported)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.TerminateAsync
member.summary: Terminate the process

member.name: E:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.OnOutput
member.summary: Event fired when output is received from stdout/stderr

member.name: E:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.OnExit
member.summary: Event fired when the process exits

member.name: E:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSession.OnTitleChanged
member.summary: Event fired when the session title changes (detected from "STATUS: Title" in output)

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSignal
member.summary: Terminal signals that can be sent to a process

member.name: F:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSignal.Interrupt
member.summary: Interrupt (Ctrl+C)

member.name: F:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSignal.Quit
member.summary: Quit (Ctrl+\)

member.name: F:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSignal.Terminate
member.summary: Terminate

member.name: F:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSignal.Kill
member.summary: Kill (force)

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionConfig
member.summary: Configuration for starting a terminal session

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionConfig.Command
member.summary: The command/executable to run

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionConfig.Arguments
member.summary: Command arguments

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionConfig.WorkingDirectory
member.summary: Working directory for the process

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionConfig.Environment
member.summary: Additional environment variables

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionConfig.Columns
member.summary: Number of terminal columns (default: 120)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionConfig.Rows
member.summary: Number of terminal rows (default: 30)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionConfig.MergeStderr
member.summary: Whether to merge stderr into stdout (default: true for terminal-like behavior)

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionConfig.Timeout
member.summary: Session timeout (default: 1 hour)

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession
member.summary:
Manages a single terminal session with a spawned process. Provides real-time bidirectional I/O with minimal latency.
Key design decisions (per expert panel): - Uses raw BaseStream, NOT OutputDataReceived (which is line-buffered) - Immediate byte forwarding for sub-50ms latency - Preserves ANSI escape sequences for proper terminal rendering
LIMITATION: Uses pipe-based I/O redirection, NOT ConPTY. This means interactive TUI applications (Claude CLI, vim, htop, etc.) will not render their full interface because they detect stdout is not a TTY. For full TUI support, implement ConPTY (Windows Pseudo Console). See: https://devblogs.microsoft.com/commandline/windows-command-line-introducing-the-windows-pseudo-console-conpty/

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession.WaitingForInput
member.summary: Whether the session appears to be waiting for user input

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession.Title
member.summary: Dynamic title extracted from terminal output. Returns null if no title has been detected.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession.GetOutputHistory
member.summary: Get all output history as bytes

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start the process and begin streaming output

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession.ReadOutputAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Read from a stream and fire output events. Uses small buffer and immediate forwarding for low latency.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession.WriteInputAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Write input to the process stdin

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession.WriteInputAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Write string input (convenience method)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession.SendSignalAsync(Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSignal)
member.summary: Send a signal to the process (e.g., Ctrl+C)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession.ResizeAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Resize the terminal (updates environment, some processes respect this)

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSession.TerminateAsync
member.summary: Terminate the process

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSessionManager
member.summary: Manages multiple terminal sessions. Thread-safe for concurrent access from SignalR hub.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSessionManager.CreateSessionAsync(Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create and start a new terminal session

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSessionManager.GetSession(System.String)
member.summary: Get an existing session by ID

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSessionManager.GetAllSessions
member.summary: Get all active sessions

member.name: M:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSessionManager.RemoveSessionAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Terminate and remove a session

member.name: P:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.ITerminalSessionManager.SessionCount
member.summary: Get session count

member.name: T:Hazina.AgenticOrchestration.Terminal.TerminalSessionManager
member.summary: Implementation of terminal session manager with SignalR integration. Uses ConPTY (Windows Pseudo Console) for full interactive terminal support.
